login.title: Login
login.intro: Continue to your workspace and pick up where you left off.
login.error_429: Too many attempts. Please try again in a minute.

register.title: Register
register.intro: Create an account and set up your space for processes, team, and organization.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.intro: Enter your e-mail and we will send you a link to set a new password.
forgot_password.success: If an account with this e-mail exists, we sent a password reset link.

reset_password.title: Password recovery
reset_password.intro: Set your new password and get back to the app right away.
reset_password.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset_password.error_generic: Password reset failed. Please request a new link.

story.decision_placeholder: At this point a decision is made
story.parallel_placeholder: The process then splits into parallel steps
story.nested_decision: At this point a decision follows: {{title}}.
story.nested_parallel: At this point the process branches into concurrent activities.
story.branch_if_no_steps: If {{label}}, the process continues to the next part.
story.parallel_intro_named: At this point a parallel section runs: {{title}}.
story.parallel_intro_unnamed: At this point the following concurrent activities take place:
story.parallel_outro: When the concurrent activities are done, the process continues.
story.no_steps: The process has no steps to display.
story.no_start: The process has no start event.
story.warn_empty: Engine JSON is empty or contains no nodes.
story.warn_no_start: The process has no start event, story cannot be generated.
story.warn_multiple_starts: Process has multiple starts — story generated from start: {{label}}.
story.warn_cycle_branch: Process contains a loop — branch was shortened.
story.warn_cycle_decision: Process contains a loop — decision was shortened.
story.warn_cycle_story: Process contains a loop — story may be shortened.
story.warn_unlabeled_branches: Some decision branches have no label.

map_viewer.delete_connection_confirm: You can undo this via Ctrl+Z or by opening an older version of the map. Continue?
map_viewer.delete_element_confirm: You can undo this via Ctrl+Z or by opening an older version of the map. Continue?
map_viewer.no_diagram: No diagram has been created yet.

account.title: Account
account.passwords_mismatch: New password and confirmation must match.
account.password_too_short: New password must be at least 8 characters.

join_org.title: Organization invitation
join_org.already_member: You are already a member of {{name}}.
join_org.error_expired: This invitation has expired. Ask the owner for a new one.
join_org.error_revoked: This invitation was revoked. Ask the owner for a new link.
join_org.error_used: This invitation has already been used and cannot be used again.
join_org.error_generic: Failed to accept the organization invitation.

admin.error_api_hint: Admin API is probably not enabled or your account is not in SUPER_ADMIN_EMAILS.
admin.intro: Overview of people, organizations and models in one place. Panel is available only for the super admin allowlist and is mainly used for monitoring and quick orientation.
admin.search_models: Search by model or organization name
admin.empty_detail: Click a row to open its detail.
admin.pills_user_empty: User is not in any organization yet.
admin.pills_user_context_empty: No additional context for this person yet.
admin.pills_org_models_empty: No models found for this organization in loaded admin data.
admin.pills_model_empty: No additional org context found for this model yet.
admin.delete_confirm: Delete user {{email}}? This cannot be undone.

org.title: Organizations
org.intro: Manage your active organization, members, invites and team activity here.
org.no_orgs_hint: You don't have any organization yet. You can create your first one below.
org.summary_hint: Quick overview of team, roles and open requests in the active organization.
org.members_hint_owner: As owner you manage access and roles.
org.members_hint_member: Member list is read-only. The owner manages members.
org.no_members: This organization has no members yet.
org.add_member_hint: Enter the email of an existing BPMN.GEN user.
org.add_member_already: User is already a member of the organization.
org.add_member_success: User was added to the organization.
org.invites_subtitle: Create a link for a new team member.
org.invite_hint: The invitation belongs to the active organization. Regenerating creates a new link.
org.invite_owner_only: Only the owner of the active organization can manage invites.
org.invite_hint_expired: This invite has expired. Generate a new one.
org.invite_hint_revoked: This invite was revoked when a newer one was generated.
org.invite_hint_used: This invite has already been used and cannot be used again.
org.invite_hint_none: You haven't created an invitation yet.
org.activity_subtitle: Recent changes in team and models.
org.create_subtitle: Each user can own one organization.
org.create_owns_already: You already have an organization. You can join others via an invite link.
org.create_hint: Create an organization for team work on processes.
org.delete_stage1_subtitle: This will permanently delete the organization, its models and team notes.
org.delete_stage2_subtitle: To confirm, type the exact organization name.
org.delete_stage1_hint: After deletion the entire organization workspace will be removed. This cannot be undone.
org.delete_name_mismatch: Type the exact organization name to confirm.
org.leave_subtitle: Type your exact email to confirm.
org.leave_hint: After leaving you will lose access to models, notes and team activity of this organization.
org.leave_email_mismatch: Type your exact email to confirm.
org.member_email_mismatch: Type the exact email address to confirm.
org.promote_hint: Type the exact email of the user to confirm:
org.demote_hint: Type the exact email of the user to confirm:
org.viewer_hint: Type the exact email of the user to confirm:
org.remove_hint: Type the exact email of the user to confirm removal:
org.remove_success: User {{email}} was removed from the organization.

wizard.process_card_edit_hint: This model already exists. You are now editing its base structure...
wizard.process_card_roles_question: Who takes part in it? (one role per line)
wizard.process_card_roles_inline_note: Adding new roles will be a separate feature. For now you can edit the names of roles that already exist in the model.
wizard.process_card_roles_placeholder: Write each role on a new line
wizard.process_card_goal_question: What should be at the end?
wizard.process_card_goal_placeholder: What is the outcome of the process?
wizard.process_card_multi_start_note: Multiple starts will slow down generation.
wizard.process_card_multi_end_note: Multiple ends will slow down generation.
wizard.process_card_multi_start_edit_note: You are editing the first start in the model. There are {{count}} starts on the map in total.
wizard.process_card_missing_end_note: The model does not have an end element yet. You can prepare the text now and connect it to the map once you add the end.
wizard.process_card_multi_end_edit_note: You are editing the first end in the model. There are {{count}} ends on the map in total.
wizard.process_card_resize_title: Drag to change the height of Process card vs. Helper
wizard.lane_hint: Add steps for this role here...
wizard.lane_onboarding_copy_1: Write simply what this role does. You can separate the next step with a comma or continue on a new line.
wizard.lane_onboarding_copy_2_before: When the process needs a decision, start the sentence with
wizard.lane_onboarding_copy_2_after: The blue helper under the field will then suggest how to continue.
wizard.lane_onboarding_copy_3_before: When multiple things happen at the same time, start the sentence with
wizard.lane_onboarding_copy_4: If you're unsure, write it in your own words. The syntax check below will continuously show how it understands the text.
wizard.lane_demo_hint: For the demo, a smaller role is enough. Focus on a few clear steps and one smaller decision or parallel split.
wizard.lane_placeholder:
E.g. Reviews the request
E.g. Approves or rejects
wizard.lane_templates_sub_demo: Don't want to start from scratch?...
wizard.lane_templates_helper: Temporary helper when you want to prefill the text quickly.
wizard.help_panel_hint: Choose the writing pattern, fill in your own words, and insert it into the text. Then you only fine-tune it for your process.
wizard.help_rule_task_description: A regular activity in the process performed by a role or the system.
wizard.help_rule_xor_description: When the process can go in two directions, write the condition and what happens in both cases. You can add multiple activities in each branch.
wizard.help_rule_xor_syntax: Format: If/When <question>, then <what happens>, otherwise <what happens>
wizard.help_rule_xor_example: If the customer approves the offer, then I prepare the contract, otherwise end
wizard.help_rule_xor_yes_placeholder:
e.g. prepare the contract
send it for signature
wizard.help_rule_xor_no_placeholder:
e.g. return the request for completion
stop processing
wizard.help_rule_parallel_description: When several activities happen at once after this point, write them on separate lines. The helper will insert them into one parallel row.
wizard.help_rule_parallel_example: Parallel: prepare contract; verify identity; set installments
wizard.help_rule_parallel_field_label: Steps happening at the same time
wizard.help_rule_parallel_field_placeholder:
e.g. prepare contract
verify identity
set installments
wizard.process_template_approval_trigger: A new request from the client
wizard.lane_template_approval_text:
Receive request
Verify identity
If identity does not match then reject the request, otherwise continue
Announce the result
wizard.lane_template_complaint_text:
Receive complaint
Verify receipt
If the receipt is missing then request completion, otherwise continue
Announce the result
wizard.lane_template_order_text:
Receive order
Check inventory
If out of stock then offer an alternative, otherwise prepare the shipment
Send the shipment
wizard.lane_template_invoice_text:
Check supporting documents
Issue invoice
If data is missing then request completion, otherwise send the invoice
wizard.lane_template_onboarding_text:
Prepare onboarding plan
Set up access
If materials are missing then request completion, otherwise confirm onboarding
wizard.lane_template_parallel_text:
Receive request
Parallel: check documents; verify data; prepare proposal
Merge results
Finish processing
wizard.story_panel_subtitle: Human-readable summary of the process based on the current map.
wizard.banner_demo_text: Product demo · nothing is saved. Keep it small, up to {{maxRoles}} roles...
wizard.banner_readonly_hint_toggle: Switch to edit mode to make changes.
wizard.banner_version_text: You are viewing an older version {{label}}.
wizard.welcome_hint_tip2: Tip: write the process in plain language...
wizard.lane_insert_hint: Select a step to insert into the role.
wizard.story_intro: This panel automatically generates a clean description of the process from the current map. The goal is a text that makes the user say: yes, this is exactly how we do it.
wizard.story_stale: The map changed. Refresh the process story to match the current model state.
wizard.story_empty_with_engine: Click "Refresh story" to generate the process description.
wizard.story_empty_without_engine: Load or create a map first.
wizard.demo_setup_title: Try process creation on a small example
wizard.demo_setup_intro: All you need is a process name, 1 to 2 roles, and a short sentence describing what triggers the process. Then we'll create the map skeleton together and you can add a few steps.
wizard.demo_setup_outcome: What should be at the end
wizard.demo_setup_outcome_placeholder: E.g. The request is approved or rejected
wizard.demo_setup_try_body: You'll create the process skeleton, click a role, and add a few steps. If the process has a decision, start the sentence with "if". If multiple things happen at once, start with "parallel".
wizard.demo_template_approval_output: The request is approved or rejected
wizard.demo_template_invoice_trigger: An invoice arrived from a supplier
wizard.demo_template_invoice_output: The invoice is approved and booked
wizard.demo_template_ticket_output: The ticket is resolved and closed
wizard.demo_template_onboarding_output: The employee has access and an onboarding plan
wizard.lane_overwrite_message: You already have a draft in this role. If you continue, the template will replace the current text in the panel.
wizard.layout_oversize_message: If you want to clean up empty space, first click the role or the whole process so it gets selected. Then you can drag its edge and shrink it to fit the content.
wizard.guide_card_missing_name: Let's start with the process name. In one sentence, name what we are modeling.
wizard.guide_card_missing_roles: We have the process name. Now let's add the roles, one per line, so it's clear who takes part in the process.
wizard.guide_card_missing_trigger: We have the name and roles. Now let's add what triggers the process "{{name}}".
wizard.guide_card_missing_output: We have the process start. Now let's add what should be at the end of the process or what its result should be.
wizard.guide_card_ready: We have the skeleton basics ready. Let's check the process name, roles, start and end, then click "Create model".
wizard.guide_card_ready_message: We have the skeleton basics ready. Let's review the process name, roles, start and end, then click "Create model" to turn it into the first map.
wizard.guide_card_default_message: Let's set up the basics first. Give the process a name and add the roles, one per line. Once we are ready, we will create the model.
wizard.demo_next_lane_message: We have the first role. Now click the role "{{lane}}" and add what happens there.
wizard.demo_connect_flow_message: We have filled in the steps in the roles. Now click the step from which the process should continue, choose "Connect", and drag the connection to the next object. If the process ends on a step, click it and use "End here".
wizard.model_delete_message: Do you really want to delete model {{name}}?
wizard.demo_register_required: Demo mode: saving and organizations are available after registration.
wizard.org_pick_or_create_first: First select or create an organization.
wizard.story_copy_error: Failed to copy the process story.
wizard.story_copy_empty: The process story is not ready to copy yet.
wizard.demo_roles_limit: In the demo, up to {{count}} roles are enough for now.
wizard.demo_lane_steps_limit: For the demo, a shorter role is enough. Keep at most {{count}} lines for now.
wizard.demo_skeleton_ready_message: Now click one role and add 2 to 3 short steps. If the process makes a decision, start the sentence with "if" or "when".
wizard.demo_custom_start: You can start with your own process.
wizard.lane_select_and_add: Select a lane and add at least one activity.
wizard.demo_decisions_limit: In the demo, try at most {{count}} decisions for now.
wizard.demo_lane_objects_limit: For the demo, a smaller role is enough. Keep at most {{count}} objects in one role.
wizard.demo_smaller_process_only: The demo is set up for a smaller process. If you want to continue with a larger model, open the full version.
wizard.org_access_denied_switch: The user does not have access to this organization. Try switching the organization.
wizard.org_tree_load_error: Failed to load the organization model.
wizard.demo_models_disabled: Demo mode: saved models are disabled.
wizard.org_edit_denied: You do not have permission to edit the organization model.
wizard.demo_export_disabled: Demo mode: BPMN export is disabled.
wizard.generate_or_import_first: First generate or import a diagram.
wizard.demo_import_disabled: Demo mode: BPMN import is disabled.
wizard.import_success: The BPMN model was imported into the process card.
wizard.org_model_save_error: Failed to save the model to the organization.
wizard.org_process_overwritten: The process in the organization was overwritten.
wizard.org_model_saved: The model was saved to the organization.
wizard.org_missing_or_denied: You have no organization or no access.
wizard.org_overwrite_pick_first: First select a process to overwrite.
wizard.org_overwrite_missing_target: No existing process to overwrite was found.
wizard.org_delete_request_sent: The delete request was sent to the owner.
wizard.home_guide_1: I'll help you start with the process name and roles so the skeleton makes sense from the beginning.
wizard.home_guide_2: When you get stuck, I'll guide you to the next step that makes the most sense now.
wizard.home_guide_3: I watch that draft steps turn into a smooth process from start to finish.
wizard.home_guide_4: I'll show you where a continuation is missing, where the process closes, and what still needs to be added.
wizard.home_guide_5: I'll help you name steps so the map is understandable to other people on the team.
wizard.home_guide_6: When you finish the skeleton, I'll move you to the role or place that is worth solving next.
wizard.home_guide_7: I don't just list errors. I try to say what is already good and what the next useful step is.
wizard.home_guide_8: When you open a model in progress, I'll help you orient yourself and continue where you left off.
wizard.home_guide_9: I don't want BPMN to become a technical labyrinth. The goal is that you always know what to do next.
wizard.home_guide_10: I'm here so an idea gradually becomes a clean process map, not a chaotic sketch.
wizard.org_readonly_viewer_hint: This org model is read-only. As a viewer, you cannot edit it.
wizard.nothing_to_save: There is nothing to save. Generate or import a diagram first.
wizard.process_card_existing_description: You are editing the basic skeleton of an existing process and its main details.
wizard.process_card_new_description: Briefly describe the process, the roles, and what triggers it. We'll create the map from that.
wizard.process_card_existing_panel_description: The model already exists. This card now manages the base process skeleton and shows data directly from the map.
wizard.process_card_new_panel_description: Briefly describe the process, the roles, and what triggers it. We'll create the process skeleton from that.
wizard.lane_helper_title: Open the helper where you can insert a template or fill in a structure.
wizard.models_subtitle: Private models visible only to you. Use "Save to organization" to store them in the organizational library.
wizard.org_push_subtitle: Choose where in the team tree the current sandbox model should be saved.
wizard.org_panel_description: Process tree. Select a folder and add a Folder or Process.
wizard.org_versions_empty: There are no additional versions for this process yet.
wizard.org_move_same_folder: The process is already in this folder.
wizard.org_presence_editing_self: You are currently editing this process.
wizard.append_error_generic: Failed to add steps without recalculating the map.
wizard.append_error_missing_process_parent: Missing pool/process target for inserting steps.
wizard.append_error_missing_required_node: A required step is missing from the map, likely because it was deleted.
wizard.append_error_connect_failed: BPMN rules blocked connecting the steps.
wizard.append_error_create_shape_failed: Failed to create new steps in the lane.
wizard.append_error_missing_modeler_services: The map editor is not ready.
wizard.guide_fix_gateway_message: We have a decision here that is not complete yet. Only one path currently leads out of it. Let's add the second branch so it's clear what happens for the other outcome.
wizard.guide_fix_message: There is a small inconsistency here: {{details}}. Let's fix it before we continue.
wizard.guide_skeleton_done_message: We have the process skeleton ready. Let's start with the lane "{{lane}}" and add at least 2 to 3 concrete steps. Open the lane by clicking it on the map or using the button on the right. Keep it short and action-oriented, for example Review..., Check..., Send....
wizard.guide_lane_progress_title: Stay in this lane a bit longer
wizard.guide_lane_progress_message: We have the basics of lane "{{lane}}". Let's add at least one more step so it's clear what happens here from start to handoff.
wizard.guide_next_lane_title: Let's move to the next lane
wizard.guide_next_lane_message: Lane "{{currentLane}}" already looks good. Now let's open lane "{{nextLane}}" and add its main steps so the process is complete across all participants.
wizard.guide_empty_lane_title: This lane is still waiting for steps
wizard.guide_empty_lane_message: There are no steps in lane "{{lane}}" yet. Let's open it and add at least the first concrete step so it's clear what happens here and what this lane passes on.
wizard.guide_close_process_message: The skeleton is taking shape nicely. If activity "{{label}}" is the last point in the process, click it on the map and use the "End here" button. That makes it clear where the process flow ends.
wizard.guide_missing_next_title: A next step is missing here
wizard.guide_missing_next_message: Activity "{{label}}" does not have a continuation yet. Let's click this step on the map and decide: either connect it to the next step, or use "End here" if the process ends right there.
wizard.guide_missing_prev_title: This step needs something before it
wizard.guide_missing_prev_message: Activity "{{label}}" does not have a predecessor yet. Let's look on the map to see which step should lead here so the flow between lanes or steps is clear.
wizard.guide_connect_lanes_title: Let's connect the lanes into one flow
wizard.guide_connect_lanes_message_with_lane: We have the steps filled in. Now let's turn them into one smooth process from start to end. We'll begin in lane "{{lane}}", where a connection to the next part is still missing.
wizard.guide_connect_lanes_message: We have the steps filled in. Now let's turn them into one smooth process from start to end and add the missing links between lanes.
wizard.guide_placeholder_message_many: We still have {{count}} placeholder names, for example {{token}}. At this point it's no longer about the skeleton but about clearer details. Let's rename them to real names so the process is understandable to other people too.
wizard.guide_placeholder_message_one: We still have a placeholder name, for example {{token}}. Let's refine this detail and rename it to a real name.
wizard.guide_refine_names_title: Let's make the names more specific
wizard.guide_refine_names_message: The process already looks good. Now let's refine the last generic names like "Process step" or "New decision" so it's immediately clear what is happening in the process.
wizard.guide_one_more_steps_message: We already have something in lane "{{lane}}". Let's stay here a little longer and add one or two more steps so its flow is clearer, then we'll move on.
wizard.guide_demo_done_message: We have a complete process flow. In the demo you tried the skeleton, steps, links, and process ending. If you want to continue without limits and save the model, create an account.
wizard.guide_ready_save_message: We have a consistent map that feels complete. Now is the right time to save the process. After that we can decide whether to keep working with it in the sandbox or move it to the organization.
wizard.guide_complete_message: This looks good. We have a complete and clearly named process ready for the next step. Now we only need to decide whether to keep it in the sandbox or move it to the organization.
wizard.conflict_subtitle: A process with this name already exists in the organization. Choose how to continue.
wizard.conflict_exists: A process named "{{name}}" already exists in the organizational layer.
wizard.overwrite_confirm_message: Do you really want to overwrite the selected process in the organizational layer?
wizard.overwrite_confirm_hint: If you overwrite this process, the changes from your sandbox will be applied in the organizational layer.
wizard.delete_process_subtitle: Direct deletion is available only to roles with permission to delete organizational processes.
wizard.delete_request_subtitle: This request will be sent to the organization owner for approval.
wizard.delete_process_tree_message: Process "{{name}}" will be removed from the organizational tree.
wizard.delete_request_reason_hint: Send the owner a short reason why the process should be removed.
wizard.delete_request_reason_placeholder: Briefly explain why the process should be removed...
wizard.delete_final_message: Do you really want to delete process "{{name}}"?
wizard.save_model_prompt_message: You have a model in progress. Do you want to save it before opening another one?
wizard.regenerate_message: The model already exists. If you continue, the process skeleton will be generated again from the current data in the process card.
wizard.new_model_message: You have a model in progress. If you continue, unsaved changes will be lost and a new empty process card will open.
wizard.open_process_message: The latest version of process "{{name}}" will be opened.
wizard.org_edit_message: Changes will be saved to the organization. Do you want to continue?
wizard.lane_decision_d0_short: This looks like a decision. First, fill in when it should happen. For example: "If the request is complete ...".
wizard.lane_decision_d0_fill: Good. Now continue with the word "then" so it's clear what happens next.
wizard.lane_decision_d1: Now add "then" and right after it the first step. For example: "then I approve the request".
wizard.lane_decision_d1a: After "then", add the first step that should happen next.
wizard.lane_decision_d2_with_multiple: This part looks good. Now add "otherwise" and then the first step for the other case.
wizard.lane_decision_d2: If more steps follow after "then", separate them with a comma. Once this part is ready, add "otherwise".
wizard.lane_decision_d2a: After "otherwise", add the first step. For example: "otherwise I return the request for completion".
wizard.lane_decision_d3_complete: The decision is OK. Both parts are filled in and you can still refine them.
wizard.lane_decision_d3: The decision is OK. If more steps follow after "otherwise", separate them with a comma.
wizard.lane_parallel_p0: This looks like parallel steps. Add at least 2 actions and separate them with a comma or the word "and".
wizard.lane_parallel_p1: We have the first parallel action. Add one more so it's clear what happens at the same time.
wizard.lane_parallel_p2: The parallel steps are OK. If you want, add another action after a comma.
wizard.lane_analysis_xor_success: Great, this is a decision in the process.
wizard.lane_analysis_parallel_hint: Parallel: "Parallel: step; step; step" or "Parallel: step, step, step".
wizard.lane_analysis_parallel_warning: Add at least 2 steps and separate them with ; or ,.
wizard.lane_analysis_parallel_success: Great, this is a parallel split.
wizard.lane_analysis_task_hint: This will be a regular process step.
wizard.notes_subtitle: Capture agreements, questions, and decisions so the whole team can see them.
wizard.notes_need_org: Notes are tied to an organization. First select an active organization.
wizard.notes_empty_no_org: The notes for the selected organization will appear here.
wizard.notes_empty_none: This organization has no notes yet. Add the first one above.
wizard.activity_subtitle: Overview of changes, requests, and team activity in the current organization.
wizard.activity_empty_no_org: Team activity will appear after you select an organization.
wizard.activity_empty_none: There are no recorded events here yet.
wizard.activity_other_empty: There is no other activity here yet.
